name: Safrochain.com
shortDescription: Official website: Africa-first vision, tokenomics, roadmap, FAQ, network status, and ecosystem links.
description: Safrochain.com showcases the Cosmos SDK layer, IBC interoperability, sub-cent fees, and core use cases such as remittances, micropayments, and savings. The site provides the roadmap (mainnet targeted Q3 2026), resources (whitepaper, brand assets), and developer access (documentation, explorer, faucet).
